summary: Oil Premium Enhancements - Iteration 194 PASSED. All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Rice Bran Sales Register shows Oil%, Diff%, Premium columns when oil_premium data exists. Oil Premium Register has date-range, party, bran_type filters with ESC key close. Export buttons work with filter params.
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Oil Premium Enhancements verified. Key features: (1) Rice Bran Sales Register table shows Oil%, Diff%, Premium columns when oil_premium entries exist for linked sales via voucher_no/rst_no. (2) Oil Premium Register has filters: date_from, date_to, party_name, bran_type. (3) ESC key closes filter panels. (4) Export endpoints (Excel/PDF) accept filter params. (5) Negative premium (deduction) shows in red. Standard Oil%: Raw=22%, Boiled=25%.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/oil-premium (Boiled positive premium) - PASS (premium=2400 for Rate=3000, Actual=27%, Qty=10)
POST /api/oil-premium (Raw negative premium/deduction) - PASS (premium<0 for Actual=20%, Standard=22%)
GET /api/oil-premium/export/excel with date_from, date_to, party_name, bran_type filters - PASS
Integration: Create Rice Bran sale + Oil Premium with same voucher_no, verify linkage - PASS
frontend_ui_tests: 2. Navigate to Register > Sales Register > Rice Bran - PASS
3. Rice Bran sub-tabs visible (Sales Register / Oil Premium) - PASS
4. BP Sale Register table shows Oil%, Diff%, Premium columns - PASS (columns visible when oil_premium data exists)
5. BP Sale Register filter panel with date inputs - PASS (4 date inputs)
6. ESC key closes BP Sale Register filters - PASS
8. Oil Premium Register filters: date_from, date_to - PASS (2 date inputs)
9. Oil Premium Register party_name filter - PASS
10. Oil Premium Register bran_type dropdown filter - PASS
11. ESC key closes Oil Premium filters - PASS
14. Oil Premium table columns (Date, Voucher, RST, Type, Party, Rate, Qty, Std%, Actual%, Diff%, Premium) - PASS

rice_bran_sales_register_oil_columns.visibility: Only shown when oil_premium entries exist for linked sales

bp_sale_register_exports.excel: Includes Oil%, Diff%, Premium columns for Rice Bran when oil_premium data exists
bp_sale_register_exports.pdf: Includes Oil%, Diff%, Premium columns for Rice Bran when oil_premium data exists

oil_premium_exports.excel: Accepts date_from, date_to, party_name, bran_type filter params
oil_premium_exports.pdf: Accepts date_from, date_to, party_name, bran_type filter params
